deferrals.summary: gh-fresh.sh's call-time fingerprint comparison (sha256_of) still depends on sha256sum/shasum+awk — the tool family the installer was migrated off for guard-class-2 reasons. On a hash-tool-less runner the freshness feature degrades per-call (disclosed defer breadcrumb, fail-safe direction) instead of failing loudly at install. Converge sha256_of onto python3 hashlib (writer/reader symmetry) in a follow-up.
deferrals.explanation: gh-fresh.sh executable lines are unmodified by this PR (comment-only diff); AC16 explicitly preserves the wrapper's existing decision outcomes including the no-hash-tool defer arm; converging the reader is follow-up material. Widens-surface check: the PR's gh-fresh.sh hunk touches lines 9-18 (header) only — no overlap with lines 92-126 within ±10.
